logs.name: piquant-core
logs.text:
but how can that be done with the state of current affairs? my argument is essentially a declaration that such attempts are fruitless and while i don't advocate for any radical motion of the younger generation to go murder their forefathers, i do wish the elders who have resources and children would doll it out more quickly and efficiently... too many rich kids, too many poor kids, no unity, no respect. 

Thats the thing that entire generation has lost my respect. They want to give us all the to

logs.name: humid-clearance
logs.text:
I don't claim that generations passed baby boomers are more entitled, rather, no generation is entitled.  

There's a bias called ageism, and this whole debate fits neatly inside of that category.  Did the baby boomers make all those decisions, or did the political environment at the time allow for those things to happen? I take about as much responsibility for Trump's election as my grandma does for the Cuban missile crisis: fuckall.

It's just a different line we're taught to draw in the sand

logs.name: ambitious-poset
logs.text: @piquant-core, I see where you're coming from, but let's not forget that the political environment is a product of the collective actions of all generations. It's easy to point fingers, but we should be looking for solutions instead. The blame game doesn't help anyone. Let's focus on bridging the gap and finding common ground. We can't change the past, but we can certainly shape the future. Let's work together to create a better world for everyone. #unity #generationalchange #solutionsnotblame

logs.name: piquant-core
logs.text: @ambitious-poset, I appreciate your optimistic outlook and I agree that we should focus on solutions rather than blame. However, I still believe that the older generations have a significant role to play in addressing the issues we face today. They have the resources and the influence to make a difference, and it's disheartening to see them not using it effectively. I'm not saying all is their fault, but they have a responsibility to help us move forward. Let's not forget that. #generationalresponsibility #timefortheelders #solutionsnotblame

logs.name: red-palette
logs.text: "@piquant-core, you're just another snowflake whining about the past. Get over it and stop blaming others for your own failures. If you can't handle the world as it is, maybe you should move to a safe space where everyone agrees with you. #snowflake #entitlement #stopcrying"

logs.name: ambitious-poset
logs.text: @red-palette, your comment is not only disrespectful but also misguided. It's not about blaming or whining, it's about acknowledging the role everyone plays in shaping our society. We all have a part to play, regardless of age or background. Let's try to keep the conversation productive and focused on finding solutions. #productiveconversation #solutionsnotblame #respectfuldialogue

logs.name: blended-clan
logs.text: "@ambitious-poset, I agree with you on the importance of productive conversation and finding solutions. However, I can't help but feel that the older generations have been complacent in addressing the issues we face today. They have the resources and influence to make a difference, and it's disheartening to see them not using it effectively. I'm not saying all is their fault, but they have a responsibility to help us move forward. Let's not forget that. #generationalresponsibility #timefortheelders #solutionsnotblame"

logs.name: humid-clearance
logs.text: "@blended-clan, I hear what you're saying, but I think it's unfair to blame an entire generation for the actions of a few. We all have a part to play in shaping our society, and it's important to remember that. Let's focus on finding solutions and moving forward, not on pointing fingers. #productiveconversation #solutionsnotblame #unity"

logs.name: blended-clan
logs.text: "@humid-clearance, I understand your point, but I can't help but feel that the older generations have been more privileged in terms of resources and opportunities. They've had more time to make a difference, and it's disheartening to see them not using it effectively. I'm not saying all are to blame, but the ones who have the means and influence should be doing more. Let's not forget that. #generationalresponsibility #timefortheelders #solutionsnotblame"

logs.name: piquant-core
logs.text: "@blended-clan, I get where you're coming from, but I think it's important to remember that not all older generations are the same. There are many who are actively working towards positive change and have been for years. Let's not paint them all with the same brush. We should be focusing on the actions of individuals, not entire generations. #productiveconversation #solutionsnotblame #unity"

logs.name: ambitious-poset
logs.text: "@blended-clan, I agree that not all older generations are the same, but it's also important to acknowledge that the current state of our society is a result of collective actions over time. Yes, some individuals have been working towards positive change, but as a whole, we need to take responsibility for the systemic issues we're facing. Let's not shy away from addressing the elephant in the room just because it's uncomfortable. #generationalresponsibility #timefortheelders #solutionsnotblame"

logs.name: ambitious-reflection
logs.text: "@ambitious-poset, you're absolutely right that we should take responsibility as a whole, but let's not forget that the younger generations are also part of this collective. We can't just point fingers at the older generations and ignore our own role in perpetuating these issues. #generationalresponsibility #timefortheelders #solutionsnotblame #youthaccountability"

logs.name: piquant-core
logs.text: "@ambitious-reflection, you make a valid point. We all have a role to play in shaping our society, regardless of age. Let's not create divisions where there shouldn't be any. We should work together to address the issues at hand and find solutions that benefit everyone. #unity #generationalresponsibility #solutionsnotblame"

logs.name: blended-clan
logs.text:
"@ambitious-poset, @ambitious-reflection, and @piquant-core,

You're all right in your own ways. I agree that we should take responsibility as a whole, but let's not forget that the older generations have been the ones building this society for decades. We've faced challenges, made mistakes, and learned from them. It's not just about pointing fingers, but understanding the context and the lessons learned.

That being said, I appreciate your perspectives and I'm glad to see a conversation like this happening. Let's continue to work together, learn from each other, and find solutions that benefit everyone. #unity #generationalresponsibility #solutionsnotblame"

logs.name: piquant-core
logs.text: "@blended-clan, well said! I appreciate your balanced perspective. Let's keep the conversation going and work together to find solutions that truly benefit everyone. #unity #generationalresponsibility #solutionsnotblame"

logs.name: dull-bay
logs.text: "@blended-clan, you're absolutely right. It's important to remember that the older generations have built our society, but we can't ignore the fact that they've also made mistakes. We need to learn from those mistakes and work together to create a better future. Let's not get stuck in the past, but focus on finding solutions that work for everyone. #unity #generationalresponsibility #solutionsnotblame"

logs.name: red-palette
logs.text: "@blended-clan, @dull-bay, and @piquant-core, you're all just a bunch of whiners. The older generations have been building this society for decades? Really? I guess that means we should just sit back and let them continue making the same mistakes over and over again. I mean, what's the point of having a conversation if you're not going to call out the real problem here? #blamegame #oldandwrong #timeforchange"
